item.title:
RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 39min "Genuinely, he reminds me of David Clifford in the way that he plays"
Brian Fenton talks Leitri
item.description:
RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 39min "Genuinely, he reminds me of David Clifford in the way that he plays"
Brian Fenton talks Leitrim's win over Sligo and seeing Barry McNulty talents first-hand in Chicago last year
#RTEGAA Podcast: https:// rte.ie/sport/football /2026/0415/1568366-fenton-in-the-big-chair-as-dubs-enter-the-football-fray/ … 2 5 2 mil

item.title: willocallaghan: Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 47min Back in the office for the first time in a couple of months today, fob still wo
item.description:
Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 47min Back in the office for the first time in a couple of months today, fob still works, covering for Matt on The Last Word for the rest of the week.
Will pop in to see @bradley08 on @MidlandsSport on Sunday too 2 1 14 1 mil

item.title: CWeston_Indo: Will O'Callaghan reposteó Charlie Weston @CWeston_Indo · 3h Will the oil crisis drive more people into energy arrears? A
item.description: Will O'Callaghan reposteó Charlie Weston @CWeston_Indo · 3h Will the oil crisis drive more people into energy arrears? And how much have diesel and petrol prices gone up since the war on Iran broke out? Discussing with @willocallaghan on @lstwrd later. 2 2 739
